```{mermaid}
%%| fig-cap: "The neuroim value lifecycle. Spatial context and provenance are intrinsic at every step — never reconstructed, never carried in a sidecar."
flowchart LR
    A["raw array<br/>+ affine"] --> B["typed object<br/>NeuroVec / NeuroVol"]
    B --> C["operation<br/>series_roi · temporal_snr · searchlight_apply"]
    C --> D["typed result<br/>+ Receipt (.provenance)"]
    D --> E["file<br/>.nii.gz + neuroim/receipt/v1: extension"]
    E --> F["typed object again<br/>read_image → .provenance rehydrated"]
    F -. "audit / chain / reduce" .-> C
```

The loop is the point: a value that leaves the library as a `.nii.gz`
re-enters it with the same Receipt, so the next operation can chain,
audit, or reduce against a frame it can verify — not one it has to
trust.
